title: Folly Madness
description: A mostly vanilla modpack. With a bit of Folly on the side!
body:
This modpack is completely client-side, except for the gravestone mod, which only works in singleplayer.

It includes a lot of immersive mods, making Minecraft feel really alive. Every major optimisation mod is included, so even on a mid-range system (GTX 1650) you can expect around 200–300 FPS.

I really hope you enjoy this pack!
